# Flux 1.1 - Tum Itemler Icin Detayli Birebir Promptlar (Supabase Kaynakli)

Bu dosya dogrudan Supabase `public.items` tablosundan cekilen 317 item ile uretildi. Her item icin tek tek, uzun ve WebUI Forge + Flux 1.1 odakli prompt vardir.

## 1. boots_moccasins_common - Pero Simplex

Prompt:
Create one single, centered fantasy MMORPG item icon for the exact identifier "boots_moccasins_common" and title "Pero Simplex". Follow this strict item brief with high fidelity: A distinctive armor item themed as Pero Simplex, focused on boots identity with common rarity presentation, readable silhouette, and premium game-icon craftsmanship. The frame must contain only the item itself, with no character, no hand, no mannequin, no environment, no floor, no horizon, no secondary loot objects, and no decorative scene composition outside the item. Keep the object fully visible with small breathing room around it, never cropped, and maintain a fixed three-quarter isometric angle around 35 degrees facing left so this icon matches a unified inventory set and can be used consistently across all in-game UI surfaces.

Use a stylized game-art look, clearly non-photorealistic, with handcrafted hand-painted PBR aesthetics. Materials must read instantly and cleanly: forged metal with directional wear and edge nicks, leather with believable grain and compression lines, cloth with woven texture and controlled fold tension, crystal with translucent depth and internal light scatter, wood with subtle fiber structure, stone with chipped but intentional planes, and alchemical glass with visible thickness at contour edges. Surface storytelling should be authored and deliberate, not random texture noise. Add believable usage history: micro-abrasion on prominent ridges, tiny scratches near mechanical contact zones, light patina in recessed engravings, and selective edge polishing where repeated handling occurs. Preserve bold silhouette first, medium forms second, and tertiary ornament last.

Lighting should be dramatic but disciplined: one strong key light from upper-left front, a cooler fill from lower-right, and a narrow rim light to separate the contour from transparent alpha. Keep high contrast without crushing detail in dark values. Specular accents must guide shape readability across blades, bevels, straps, rings, caps, seals, glyph cuts, gemstone facets, and emblem planes. Apply rarity energy with control and readability: common uses restrained neutral glints; uncommon uses soft emerald accents; rare uses cool sapphire sheen; epic uses violet energized seams; legendary uses warm amber radiance; mythic uses deep crimson cosmic pulse. Energy effects must hug the form as thin emissive channels, tiny particles, or contour-adjacent aura fringes; avoid chaotic fog clouds or oversized VFX that hide silhouette.

Construction logic must remain believable and game-ready: straps must anchor to load-bearing zones, rivets and stitch lines follow structural stress, guards protect grip areas, rune spacing stays consistent, and attached ornaments obey gravity and join mechanics. Keep palette disciplined around base material family plus rarity accents, placing saturation near focal landmarks only. Final output intent: premium production icon with transparent background, clean anti-aliased edges, no text, no letters, no watermark, no logo, no border frame, and no UI overlay artifacts. The icon must remain instantly identifiable at 64, 128, 256, and 512 pixels while retaining rich detail at 1024 master resolution for export and downscaling workflows.

Negative prompt: photorealistic photo, human character, hand holding object, full scene background, landscape, architecture, multiple unrelated objects, cluttered composition, low readability silhouette, washed colors, excessive bloom, dense smoke blanket, text, letters, numbers, watermark, logo, frame, UI, cropped object, duplicate items, warped geometry, melted materials, noisy artifacts, jpeg artifacts.

Forge / Flux 1.1 notu: 1:1 oran, 1024x1024 master. Ilk cikis sonrasinda sadece silhouette clarity ve edge readability odakli hafif revizyon pass uygulanabilir.

---

Create one single, centered fantasy MMORPG item icon for the exact identifier "res_shadow_mythic" and title "res_shadow_mythic". Follow this strict item brief with high fidelity: A distinctive material item themed as res_shadow_mythic, focused on core archetype identity with mythic rarity presentation, readable silhouette, and premium game-icon craftsmanship. The frame must contain only the item itself, with no character, no hand, no mannequin, no environment, no floor, no horizon, no secondary loot objects, and no decorative scene composition outside the item. Keep the object fully visible with small breathing room around it, never cropped, and maintain a fixed three-quarter isometric angle around 35 degrees facing left so this icon matches a unified inventory set and can be used consistently across all in-game UI surfaces.

Use a stylized game-art look, clearly non-photorealistic, with handcrafted hand-painted PBR aesthetics. Materials must read instantly and cleanly: forged metal with directional wear and edge nicks, leather with believable grain and compression lines, cloth with woven texture and controlled fold tension, crystal with translucent depth and internal light scatter, wood with subtle fiber structure, stone with chipped but intentional planes, and alchemical glass with visible thickness at contour edges. Surface storytelling should be authored and deliberate, not random texture noise. Add believable usage history: micro-abrasion on prominent ridges, tiny scratches near mechanical contact zones, light patina in recessed engravings, and selective edge polishing where repeated handling occurs. Preserve bold silhouette first, medium forms second, and tertiary ornament last.

Lighting should be dramatic but disciplined: one strong key light from upper-left front, a cooler fill from lower-right, and a narrow rim light to separate the contour from transparent alpha. Keep high contrast without crushing detail in dark values. Specular accents must guide shape readability across blades, bevels, straps, rings, caps, seals, glyph cuts, gemstone facets, and emblem planes. Apply rarity energy with control and readability: common uses restrained neutral glints; uncommon uses soft emerald accents; rare uses cool sapphire sheen; epic uses violet energized seams; legendary uses warm amber radiance; mythic uses deep crimson cosmic pulse. Energy effects must hug the form as thin emissive channels, tiny particles, or contour-adjacent aura fringes; avoid chaotic fog clouds or oversized VFX that hide silhouette.

Construction logic must remain believable and game-ready: straps must anchor to load-bearing zones, rivets and stitch lines follow structural stress, guards protect grip areas, rune spacing stays consistent, and attached ornaments obey gravity and join mechanics. Keep palette disciplined around base material family plus rarity accents, placing saturation near focal landmarks only. Final output intent: premium production icon with transparent background, clean anti-aliased edges, no text, no letters, no watermark, no logo, no border frame, and no UI overlay artifacts. The icon must remain instantly identifiable at 64, 128, 256, and 512 pixels while retaining rich detail at 1024 master resolution for export and downscaling workflows.

Negative prompt: photorealistic photo, human character, hand holding object, full scene background, landscape, architecture, multiple unrelated objects, cluttered composition, low readability silhouette, washed colors, excessive bloom, dense smoke blanket, text, letters, numbers, watermark, logo, frame, UI, cropped object, duplicate items, warped geometry, melted materials, noisy artifacts, jpeg artifacts.
